race.description: Become A Brc Member Maiden Plate
race.comment: ISLA DELILAH (11) is unlucky to still be a maiden placing at her past four outings and strikes a very winnable contest here. Gets in well at the weights with the claim and should be right there when the whips are cracking. PROMISES MADE (12) just missed the frame when well in the market last time out and where there's smoke there's fire. Can feature with natural improvement. AMELIORATION (5) has placed around this circuit and is better than the past couple of efforts suggest. Worth another chance. CLASSIC SHIRAZ (8) went down by the narrowest of margins last start and looks to be building up to a maiden victory. In the mix. KOOLIBAH (9) next in line out of the champion Waller yard.
